lineage.Process: CreateLocator CAN "M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\results\processing.gdb\Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB Parcel" 'Parcel.CITY Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.City';'Parcel.REGION Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.Prov';'Parcel.REGION_ABBR Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.Prov_Abbriviation';'Parcel.COUNTRY Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.CountryCode';'Parcel.POSTAL Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.OwnerZip_1';'Parcel.STREET_NAME Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.Street';'Parcel.PARCEL_NAME Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.PIN';'Parcel.HOUSE_NUMBER Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.House';'Parcel.SUB_ADDRESS_LEVEL Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.FLOOR';'Parcel.SUB_ADDRESS_UNIT Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.Suite';'Parcel.NEIGHBORHOOD Parcel_Calc_Address_CityWorks_WORKING_GDB.Nbrhd_Comm' M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\locators\parcels_l_16_03_2026.loc ENG # # # LOCAL_EXTRA_HIGH CURRENT_VERSION
